title: Applied Botanics Modern Fluix Pool
description: Modern look for the Fluix Mana Pool.
body:
Gives the Fluix Mana Pool from Applied Botanics a modern look to fit in with the new botania textures.

Botania:

[https://modrinth.com/mod/botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania)
